response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced and versatile software craftsman with a strong entrepreneurial background and recent exposure to AI tooling. However, the role requires a Director-level Principal Engineer with deep, recognized expertise in AI strategy, machine learning, and experience advising strategic enterprise customers. His profile aligns more closely with a hands-on Staff Full-Stack Engineer rather than a high-level strategic AI leader.
strengths: Over 15 years of versatile software engineering experience across web, mobile, and infrastructure.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial drive as the founder of Northwind Labs and creator of open-source platforms.
Recent hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP.
concerns: Lacks the preferred advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field.
No demonstrated experience operating at a Director-level capacity or advising strategic enterprise customers on AI platform strategy.
AI expertise appears relatively recent and tooling-focused rather than demonstrating deep, recognized expertise in core ML/AI strategy.
